title: Dependent Dropdown column

posts.author: Jorma (Jorma Härm)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi.

The feature I’m looking for is similar to (INDIRECT) fuction in excel.
It means that if I would choose value X in column A, I only get access to limited options in column B that are allowed depending on the value X. And then in column C I also get only limited options depending on the value I chose in column B.

In my case, I would like to solve a troubleshooting issue, where the board user doesn’t necessarily know the cause of the problem, but choosing 4-5 values step-by-step from dropdowns will narrow the root problem really thin.

Is there maybe already some kind of workaround for this available, and if not, would this be feasible to add?
